Maryland Wedding Planner Service Areas

John serves couples across all of Maryland, from Baltimore City through the Eastern Shore, Western Maryland, and the DC suburbs.

Anne Arundel County

Annapolis, MD

Waterfront venues, historic downtown, Chesapeake Bay settings.

Annapolis Wedding Planner Howard County

Columbia, MD

Modern venues, lakeside settings, convenient to Baltimore and DC.

Columbia Wedding Planner Baltimore County

Towson, MD

Suburban Baltimore venues, parks, and estate properties.

Towson Wedding Planner Frederick County

Frederick, MD

Historic downtown, mountain backdrops, vineyard and farm venues.

Frederick Wedding Planner Montgomery County

Rockville, MD

DMV-area venues, suburban Maryland, close to DC couples.

Rockville Wedding Planner

Don't See Your City?

John serves all of Maryland. If your city isn't listed, reach out. He likely covers your area and can confirm availability.

Baltimore Wedding Planner

Maryland Budget Wedding Studio

Budget-friendly wedding planning for couples across Maryland. John creates beautiful, stress-free weddings for budgets under $20,000 — full-service, day-of coordination, and elopements.
